books.author: Min Jin Lee
books.description_en: An epic multigenerational saga of a Korean family in Japan — themes of identity, resilience, and sacrifice. Our inaugural title: inquiry sent to Peter Straus at RCW Literary Agency for Uzbek-language rights, target publication 2027.
books.description_uz: Yaponiyadagi koreys oilasining epik sagasi — o'ziga xoslik, matonat va fidoyilik mavzulari. Bizning birinchi nashrimiz: o'zbek tilidagi huquqlar uchun RCW adabiy agentligidagi Peter Strausga so'rov yuborilgan, 2027 yil nashri ko'zda tutilmoqda.

books.author: Matt Haig
books.description_en: A philosophical novel about infinite parallel lives and the weight of our choices. A natural fit for the young Uzbek readership.
books.description_uz: Cheksiz parallel hayotlar va tanlovlarimiz haqidagi falsafiy roman. Yosh o'zbek kitobxoni uchun tabiiy tanlov.

books.title_orig: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
books.author: Yuval Noah Harari
books.description_en: Harari's landmark survey of the human species. We have identified Uzbek as one of the few major markets without an authorised edition.
books.description_uz: Harariyning insoniyat tarixiga bag'ishlangan muhim asari. O'zbekcha rasmiy nashri yo'qligini aniqlaganmiz.

books.author: Viktor E. Frankl
books.description_en: Viktor Frankl's timeless testimony on finding meaning through suffering. A natural companion to the Uzbek cultural emphasis on perseverance.
books.description_uz: Viktor Franklning azob-uqubatlar orqali ma'no topish haqidagi abadiy guvohligi. O'zbek madaniyatidagi sabr-matonatga tabiiy hamroh.

books.author: Daniel Kahneman
books.description_en: Kahneman's Nobel-rooted synthesis of human cognition and decision-making — foundational non-fiction.
books.description_uz: Kahnemanning Nobel mukofoti bilan bog'liq inson tafakkuri va qaror qabul qilish bo'yicha sintezi — asosiy ilmiy-ommabop asar.

books.author: Peter Thiel
books.description_en: Peter Thiel's notes on startups and building the future — highly relevant to Uzbekistan's emerging entrepreneurial generation.
books.description_uz: Peter Thielning startaplar va kelajakni qurish bo'yicha yozmalari — O'zbekistonning rivojlanayotgan tadbirkor avlodi uchun dolzarb.
